summary: Iteration 13 — Mock Interview Slot Management overhaul: FULL backend + UI E2E validated. 8/8 new iter13 tests pass + 63/63 prior regression tests pass = 71/71 backend tests green. Frontend Playwright E2E covers: welcome → login → home → 'Interviews' tab → mock-interviews listing → View Slots modal → Book → ConfirmDialog 'Do you want to book this mock interview slot?' → Confirm → success ConfirmDialog 'Mock Interview booked successfully. Meeting invitation has been sent to both participants.' → slot's Book button immediately replaced by 'Booked' tag in modal. Listing card aggregation (slots_total / slots_available / fully_booked) renders correctly: 'View Slots' for available, locked 'Booked' pill when all sub-slots taken. SendGrid keeps returning 401/403 (per problem-statement context) and is captured into interview_bookings.{student_email_status,pro_email_status}='queued' — NOT considered a failure. Two pre-existing deprecation console warnings (shadow*, props.pointerEvents) still present but non-blocking (same as iteration_8/13 reports).

react_native_issues.issue: Console emits repeated 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' warnings during mock-interviews flow. Not blocking. Reference: multiple files under /app/frontend/src and /app/frontend/app.
Console emits 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' warnings. Not blocking. Reference: multiple components.

action_items: [Optional] Migrate deprecated 'shadow*' style props -> 'boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents' -> 'style.pointerEvents' across the codebase to clean up console noise.

[Tracking] SendGrid still returning 401/403 with current key — per problem statement this is expected; booking flow records emails as 'queued' and is fully functional. If/when SendGrid is fixed, the same /api/admin/interview-bookings rows should flip to 'sent' on subsequent bookings.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/interviews/slots correctly enforces duration % 30 == 0 (server.py:1310-1314) — verified 400 returned with 'multiple of 30 minutes' in detail.
Auto-split logic (server.py:1347-1376) builds N sub-slots with shared session_id and distinct meeting_url per 30-min child — verified slot_count and session_id matches.
POST /api/interviews/book uses atomic find_one_and_update on {id, status:'available'} (server.py:1462-1478) — race-safe; second concurrent claim returns 400 'Slot not available'. VERIFIED.
GET /api/interviews/slots correctly strips student_id/student_name on booked slots when role=student (server.py:1448-1449) — VERIFIED via drill-down test.
GET /api/professionals?has_available_slots=true returns pros with ANY active slot incl. fully booked (server.py:1240-1264), and exposes slots_total/slots_available/fully_booked. VERIFIED.
Booking persists interview_bookings row with student_email_status / pro_email_status (server.py:1525-1543) — VERIFIED via GET /api/admin/interview-bookings.
Admin endpoint /api/admin/interview-bookings hydrates current_slot_status (server.py:2683-2696) and requires admin role — VERIFIED (403 for student).
Frontend mock-interviews.tsx uses testIDs: pick-pro-<id>, pro-booked-<id>, slot-<id>-book, slot-<id>-booked — all wired and verified in Playwright.
Bottom tab label set to 'Interviews' (student/_layout.tsx:20) with fontSize 9 (line 14) — rendered without truncation in 390x844 viewport.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter13_slot_mgmt.py (new — 8 tests covering slot auto-split, listing aggregation, atomic booking, drill-down PII strip, admin audit)

success_rate.frontend: 100% — full booking lifecycle E2E confirmed via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Each test signs up a fresh student via /auth/signup + mock_otp. Pros are created via signup, then DB-patched with gmail_verified=True and profile_complete=True with a minimal profile so they appear in /api/professionals.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter13 coverage lives in /app/backend/tests/test_iter13_slot_mgmt.py. Note that the listed_pro fixture there does DB-side profile_complete=True + gmail_verified=True to bypass the legitimate profile-completion gate (the global 'professional' fixture in conftest.py only flips gmail_verified). If you write new tests for the listing endpoint, reuse listed_pro or replicate _mark_profile_complete. The startup wipe of interview_slots+interview_bookings only happens once (settings marker iter13_slot_wipe_2026_01); subsequent restarts are no-ops. SendGrid 401/403 is environmental — do NOT treat 'queued' email status as a bug.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Initial 2 test failures during dev were due to my own fixture missing profile_complete=True; fixed by adding a listed_pro fixture in the iter13 test file that DB-patches profile_complete + a minimal profile so the pro surfaces in /api/professionals (which legitimately requires profile_complete=True per server.py:1217).
